_comment: Mutation testing config. Run manually with: npx stryker run. Weekly via .github/workflows/mutation.yml.
_mutate_comment: We mutate tests/unit/_helpers.ts which holds standalone copies of pure helpers from scripts/codemod.ts. The codemod.ts copies stay inlined for jssg sandbox compatibility — drift is caught by pure-helpers.test.ts assertions. Mutating _helpers.ts gives a meaningful signal: every surviving mutant represents a real test gap, not a test-name string tweak.
